headline: Taiwan prosecutors detain Super Micro employees over chip exports
summary: Investing.com -- Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees on Wednesday following a raid of the company's local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China, according to a Bloomberg report early Wednesday.

raw.headline: Taiwan prosecutors detain Super Micro employees over chip exports
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees on Wednesday following a raid of the company's local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China, according to a Bloomberg report early Wednesday.

headline: Super Micro Stock Falls After Taiwan Detains Employees in Nvidia Chip Smuggling Probe
summary: Super Micro Computer shares are trading lower Wednesday after Bloomberg reported that Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro employees following a raid of the company’s local offices earlier this week tied to an alleged Nvidia Corp chip-smuggling probe.

raw.headline: Super Micro Stock Falls After Taiwan Detains Employees in Nvidia Chip Smuggling Probe
raw.summary: Super Micro Computer shares are trading lower Wednesday after Bloomberg reported that Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro employees following a raid of the company’s local offices earlier this week tied to an alleged Nvidia Corp chip-smuggling probe.
